creator: ports@christianserving.org
text:
On Apr 22, 2011, at 6:42 AM, Pavel Timofeev wrote:

> If libexecinfo already have installed zabbix-server doesn't compile
> with EXECINFO=3Doff.
> But it compiles with EXECINFO=3Don.
> Tried second patch from Jim.


Does anyone have any thoughts on how to handle this?  I don't want to =
force libexecinfo as a dependency.  I guess I can make some changes to =
configure...=
